case_title: HUNTER LI ET AL VS. AMBER LACE LYNCH

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, HUNTER TIEU, TRINH KIET AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, AMBER LACE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, HUNTER TIEU, TRINH KIET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, AMBER LACE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LI, HUNTER TIEU, TRINH KIET AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, AMBER LACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, AMBER LACE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-24-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, AMBER LACE
